title: Write ferrum_extlib_asn1.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_asn1: BER/DER/CER codec, schema-driven, strict DER by default, ANY DEFINED BY with dispatch tables. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: OID type, schema-driven decode/encode, ANY DEFINED BY dispatch, bare ANY as opaque capture, max nesting depth, all string types normalized to UTF-8, X.509/PKCS/CMS format support.
